typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	sArchiveDirectory as string,
	sFileName as string,
	sSearchDirectory as string,
	sSearchFileName as string
}
source(output(
		TCOOPE as string,
		DRD as string,
		Server_WFGUID as string,
		SourceID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> FoundFile
source(output(
		ID as integer,
		DRDJiraNumber as string,
		TCOOPEJiraNumber as string,
		Device_WFGUID as string,
		SourceID as string,
		SourceFileName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> LookupLKPTABLE
FoundFile derive(DRDJiraNumber = $sFileName,
		import_dt = currentDate()) ~> FileNameJiraNumber
FileNameJiraNumber, LookupLKPTABLE lookup(DRD == LookupLKPTABLE@DRDJiraNumber
	&& FoundFile@SourceID == LookupLKPTABLE@SourceID
	&& TCOOPE == TCOOPEJiraNumber
	&& Server_WFGUID == Device_WFGUID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'auto')~> Lookup
Lookup select(mapColumn(
		DRDJiraNumber = FileNameJiraNumber@DRDJiraNumber,
		import_dt,
		TCOOPE,
		DRD,
		Server_WFGUID,
		SourceID = FoundFile@SourceID,
		ID,
		TCOOPEJiraNumber,
		Device_WFGUID,
		SourceFileName
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupSelect
LookupSelect split(isMatch(),
	disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match, NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@NotMatch sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		TCOOPEJiraNumber = TCOOPE,
		SourceFileName = DRDJiraNumber,
		SourceID,
		Device_WFGUID = Server_WFGUID,
		DRDJiraNumber = DRD,
		Import_dt = import_dt
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
